case_title: PENATE ALFREDO VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JUL-24-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02 TRIAL OF JUN-18-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENATE ALFREDO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY OF DALY CITY CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CCSF AND WESTLAKE AUTO SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
